data.title: A whale spent 5685 SOL to buy 18.58 million YZY
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that a whale spent 5,685 SOL (US$755,000) to purchase 18.58 million YZY. These tokens are currently worth US$492,000, with a floating loss of US$263,000.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale continues to increase short positions, now holds $330 million in BTC short positions, with a liquidation price of $84,745
data.description:
On-chain analyst Yu Jin Monitoring said that the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid continued to increase its short positions and currently holds BTC short positions worth 330 million. Specifically, the whale used 7.016 million USDC margin on Hyperliquid and 40x leverage to open short positions of 3,960 BTC, worth 330 million US dollars.
The opening price was 84,040 US dollars, the liquidation price was 84,745 US dollars, and the current floating profit was 1 million US dollars.

data.title: US authorities release Russian cybercriminal as part of exchange for schoolteacher
data.description:
The United States authorities have released Russian cybercriminal Alexander Vinnik to Russia as part of an exchange with American schoolteacher Marc Fogel regaining his freedom. According to reports, Vinnik arrived in Moscow on a flight from Turkey after he was released from custody in California. The Russian cybercriminal was accused of owning and operating one […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-authorities-release-russian-cybercriminal/
